twitter_thread: 85% of AI projects use paid tools. I've found 3 free open-source alternatives that outperform them.
Orange2ai's orange-line-illustration generates 50+ unique illustrations in under 10 minutes.
Ignoring free open-source AI tool customizability can cost you 30% in efficiency.
Customizing orange2ai's illustration skill saved me $6,000 in the last year on commercial licenses.
I replaced Trello and Asana with free open-source alternatives, saving $240/yr.
Free open-source AI tools require 2-5 hours of setup, but can save 10 hours/week in manual work.
What's the most unexpected way you've used a free open-source AI tool?
